name: nest-microservice

scripts.install:all: cd api-gateway && npm install && cd ../auth-service && npm install && cd ../user-service && npm install && cd ../product-service && npm install && cd ../shared-lib && npm install
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n gateway,auth,user,product -c green,blue,yellow,magenta "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:user" "npm run start:product"
scripts.build:all: concurrently -n gateway,auth,user,product -c green,blue,yellow,magenta "npm run pre-commit" "npm run pre-commit" "npm run pre-commit" "npm run pre-commit"

author: Deepak Abari
description: A comprehensive NestJS microservices laboratory demonstrating TCP communication, API Gateway, JWT authentication, and clean architecture.
